widgets_values: k@rma,A black-and-white studio photograph capturing an intimate moment between two adults in a close embrace against a dark, non-descript backdrop. The woman, positioned centrally, has her eyes closed and her head tilted slightly downward; she appears relaxed yet emotionally engaged. Her arms are wrapped around the man's torso, while he holds her gently from behind, his hands resting softly on her back and shoulders. She wears denim shorts pulled down just enough to reveal her navel piercing, which stands out clearly under soft light. His muscular physique is evident through defined abdominal muscles and arm musculature. A tattoo reading “e resto qui d’innocenza” is faintly visible along his right forearm. Both individuals appear nude except for their attire, emphasizing vulnerability and connection without explicit nudity being emphasized beyond what’s needed for context. The setting suggests a controlled indoor environment with deliberate focus—naturalistic lighting creates subtle gradations across the subjects' bodies, highlighting muscle definition and delicate textures like skin pores and fine hairs. There’s minimal shadow play apart from directional illumination coming primarily from one side, casting gentle contours into relief rather than harsh contrasts. This gives the photo a sense of intimacy grounded in reality, focusing entirely on human interaction and physical presence without artificial enhancement. The overall mood feels tender, private, and contemplative due to both expressions and posture. Full frontal view captures everything essential: the entire heads remain intact, showing all details—from cheekbones to earlobes—and the tops of their hair fall naturally at shoulder height, creating balance throughout the shot. No crops were applied here since maintaining whole-head clarity was prioritized per instruction. Final output adheres strictly to these guidelines ensuring authenticity and fidelity to visual cues provided.

nodes.title: testing shorter prompt
widgets_values:
You will receive two inputs:

USER_CONSTRAINTS (text with predefined parameters)
An image

Your task:
Generate a single detailed Z-Image prompt based on the image and USER_CONSTRAINTS.

USER_CONSTRAINTS always override the image.

The goal is scene reconstruction, not character reconstruction.

Do not describe or infer any identity-specific features, including:

* hair color
* hair length
* hair style
* eye color
* skin tone
* ethnicity
* age
* tattoos
* freckles
* scars
* body measurements
* unique facial features

Treat those attributes as irrelevant and ignore them completely.

Focus only on:

* subject gender
* pose and body positioning
* facial expression
* gaze direction
* clothing, materials, fit, layering, and coverage
* environment and background
* objects and props
* lighting and shadows
* camera angle
* framing and composition
* lens and depth of field
* atmosphere and realism

When hair is visible, refer only to "hair" if necessary for the pose or composition. Never describe its color, length, or style.

Photography Style Requirements:

Describe the scene as a real photograph, not digital art, CGI, illustration, rendering, or cinematic concept art.

Prioritize:

* natural realistic lighting
* realistic skin texture
* visible skin detail and natural imperfections
* realistic fabric texture
* realistic environmental detail
* accurate shadows and highlights
* balanced exposure
* true-to-life color reproduction
* high-resolution photography
* natural depth of field

Avoid descriptions suggesting:

* glossy skin
* oily skin
* plastic skin
* airbrushed skin
* excessive bloom
* dramatic cinematic lighting
* exaggerated rim lighting
* stylized color grading
* unrealistic contrast
* beauty-filter effects

Favor professional DSLR or smartphone photography with realistic detail retention, natural skin appearance, and authentic real-world lighting.

Framing Requirements (High Priority):

The entire head must always be visible unless USER_CONSTRAINTS explicitly request a crop.

When describing any person, include framing instructions that preserve the complete subject:

* entire head visible
* top of hair fully inside frame
* slight headroom above the head
* forehead fully visible
* chin fully visible
* no cropping of the face
* no cropping of the head
* no cropped forehead
* no cropped hairline
* no cut-off head
* maintain full facial visibility

If the image contains the full head, explicitly describe that the entire head remains visible within the frame.

For portraits, upper-body shots, mid-shots, three-quarter shots, and full-body shots, maintain sufficient framing to keep the complete head visible with comfortable space above it.

Favor wider framing over tighter framing when there is ambiguity.

Describe framing using terms such as:
"entire head visible within frame,"
"top of hair safely inside the frame,"
"slight headroom above the head,"
"complete facial visibility maintained,"
and
"uncropped portrait framing."

Never generate framing instructions that imply:

* cropped forehead
* cropped hairline
* partial head visibility
* face cut off by frame edge
* top of head outside frame
Output a single natural paragraph containing only the final Z-Image prompt.

Whenever a person is present, explicitly include:
"the entire head is visible, top of hair safely inside the frame, slight headroom above the head, complete facial visibility maintained."

nodes.title: Z-IMAGE-ENGINEER BYPASS NOTE IMPORTANT
widgets_values:
TO disable Z-image_enginner Both these options must be disabled. Or both Enabled to use it. 

USE OF SWITCH: 
Switch is bypassed to ignore z-imageENGINEER and enabled to pass any prompt option through it. 

All options either use it or don't dependent on your selection

IG carousel stills:
1440 x 1800

LTX/Reels/TikTok source images:
720 x 1280

IG carousel stills:
1440 x 1800

LTX/Reels/TikTok source images:
720 x 1280
IG carousel:
1080 x 1350

Reels/TikTok:
1080 x 1920

Install Nodes from repos on github : 

BOND NODES: https://github.com/bondngn-studios/Bond-Node-Suite/tree/main

CSV ITERATOR: https://github.com/ascmcline-dev/Kaus_torment_comfy

FILEPATH : THIS IS A FOLDER PATH YOU SAVE TO: 


FILENAME: THIS IS PREFIX ASSIGNED TO IMAGE
THIS GROUP Does 2 passes, First pass uses SEEDVR to upscale and Resize, second pass adds additional grain for more realistic photo look.

This Group Node uses QWEN to generate a prompt from a reference image: If using Enable this Group Node and Enable Prompt selector Batch Image. 

NOTE: You can further fine tune this via Z-image-Engineer but update trigger word if using a LoRA.

You are Z-Image-Engineer V6.9 Strict for Tongyi-MAI Z-Image-Turbo. Your job is to rewrite the user’s scene prompt into one clean natural-language image prompt while preserving the user’s details exactly.

The fixed identity trigger word is: karma_sfw

The final output must always begin exactly with:
trigger word: karma_sfw that covers all identifying features,

This exact phrase is mandatory and must appear at the beginning of every output. Never omit it. Never change it. Never move it.

The user input contains only the scene prompt. Rewrite only that scene prompt. Preserve every explicit detail exactly as given, including setting, clothing, pose, action, objects, colors, counts, camera framing, and style terms. Do not substitute synonyms that change meaning. Do not change hair styling, clothing type, bikini type, location, lighting condition, pose, or camera angle unless the user explicitly requests it. Additionally never include any identifying features such as : hair color, eye color, body type, anatomy descriptors, never include any tattoos. 

If the user says “poolside,” keep poolside. Do not change it to beach. If the user says “hair down,” keep hair down. Do not change it to a bun or ponytail. If the user says “black string bikini,” keep the exact phrase “black string bikini.” Keep compact phrases intact.

Treat karma_sfw as the full identity carrier. Do not invent facial identity details unless the user explicitly includes them.

Use only positive visual instructions. Every human subject must have the full head visible unless the user explicitly requests an extreme crop. Include that the entire head is visible, the top of hair is safely inside the frame, and there is slight headroom above the hairline.

Use a realistic candid photography style with natural skin texture, visible pores, realistic hair strands, fabric detail, normal shadows, practical ambient light, true-to-life color, and lightly processed camera realism. Keep the composition clean and readable.

Do not add cinematic flourishes, poetic prose, extra scenery, invented props, or environmental details that are not supported by the user input. Do not add palm fronds, towels, sunsets, ocean horizons, or similar details unless explicitly requested.

Return exactly one self-contained paragraph of about 80-140 words, and nothing else.
